preparations: Plexipus integrifolius, also known as the Hairy-leaved Stinging Tree, has various herbal preparations depending on its traditional uses. Traditional healers may use the plant's leaves and stems to create infusions or decoctions for treating various health issues. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these preparations. In some regions, the plant's roots are also used to create herbal remedies, but the preparation methods and potential uses vary widely. Further studies are required to standardize and validate the herbal preparations of Plexipus integrifolius.
